member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Attributes.FileCategoryAttribute
member.summary: Custom attribute to define the category of a file entity class. Demonstrates the use of Attributes and Reflection.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Attributes.FileCategoryAttribute.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Custom attribute to define the category of a file entity class. Demonstrates the use of Attributes and Reflection.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Attributes.FileCategoryAttribute.Category
member.summary: Gets the category name.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions
member.summary: Defines the permissions that can be applied to a file or folder. This enum uses the Flags attribute to allow bitwise combinations. REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojamos bitinės operacijos (1 t.)

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.None
member.summary: No permissions granted.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.Read
member.summary: Permission to read the file.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.Write
member.summary: Permission to modify the file.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.Execute
member.summary: Permission to run the file.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.Delete
member.summary: Permission to remove the file.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.Share
member.summary: Permission to share the file with others.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions.All
member.summary: All permissions granted.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Enums.StorageType
member.summary: Defines the type of storage provider.

member.name: F:LocalNode.Core.Enums.StorageType.LocalDisk
member.summary: Files are stored on the local physical disk.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.FileHostingException
member.summary: Base exception class for all custom exceptions in the file hosting system.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.FileHostingException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Base exception class for all custom exceptions in the file hosting system.
member.param: The message that describes the error.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.FileHostingException.#ctor(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance with a message and an inner exception.
member.param: The error message.
The exception that caused this exception.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.StorageFullException
member.summary: Exception thrown when storage is full.
member.param: The error message.
Space needed in bytes.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.StorageFullException.#ctor(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Exception thrown when storage is full.
member.param: The error message.
Space needed in bytes.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.StorageFullException.RequiredSpace
member.summary: Gets the required space.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.UnauthorizedFileAccessException
member.summary: Exception thrown when a user attempts to access a file without proper permissions.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Exceptions.UnauthorizedFileAccessException.FileId
member.summary: Gets the ID of the file that was denied access.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Extensions.FileEntityExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for IFileEntity objects.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Extensions.FileEntityExtensions.ToHumanReadableSize(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Converts the file size in bytes to a human-readable format (e.g., KB, MB, GB).

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Extensions.FileEntityExtensions.GetExtension(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Extracts the file extension from the file name.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity
member.summary: Represents a generic file entity in the hosting system. REIKALAVIMAS: Sukūrėte ir pritaikėte savo sąsają (interface) (0.5 t.)

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Id
member.summary: Gets the unique identifier for the file.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Name
member.summary: Gets the name of the file.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Size
member.summary: Gets the size of the file in bytes.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets the date and time when the file was created.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Permissions
member.summary: Gets or sets the permissions associated with the file.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Rename(System.String)
member.summary: Renames the file entity.
member.param: The new name for the file.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity.Open
member.summary: Opens the file entity for viewing or processing.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.ILogger
member.summary: Defines a simple logging contract.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.ILogger.LogInfo(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message with the Information severity level.
member.param: The message to log.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.ILogger.LogWarning(System.String)
member.summary: Logs a message with the Warning severity level.
member.param: The message to log.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.ILogger.LogError(System.String,System.Exception)
member.summary: Logs a message with the Error severity level, optionally including exception details.
member.param: The error message to log.
An optional exception to include in the log entry.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider
member.summary: Defines the contract for a storage provider.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.ProviderName
member.summary: Gets the name of the storage provider.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.TotalCapacity
member.summary: Gets the total storage capacity in bytes.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.FreeSpace
member.summary: Gets the available free space in bytes.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.SaveFile(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Saves a file entity to the storage synchronously.
member.param: The file entity to save.
member.returns: True if the operation succeeded; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.SaveFileAsync(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Saves a file entity to the storage asynchronously.
member.param: The file entity to save.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing true if succeeded.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.DeleteFile(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a file from storage by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique identifier of the file to delete.
member.returns: True if the file was deleted; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider.GetAllFiles
member.summary: Retrieves all file entities currently stored by the provider.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Logging.ConsoleLogger
member.summary: Implementation of ILogger that writes to the console with colors.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Models.ArchiveFile
member.summary: Represents a compressed archive containing multiple files. Demonstrates implementing IEnumerable for custom iteration.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Models.ArchiveFile.AddFile(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Adds a file to the archive and updates the total size.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Models.ArchiveFile.GetEnumerator
member.summary: Returns an enumerator that iterates through the archived files.

member.summary: REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojami numatyti argumentai (0.5 t.)

member.summary: REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojamas operatorių perkrovimas (0.5 t.)

member.summary: Represents a media file (e.g., Video, Audio).

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Models.UnknownFile
member.summary: Represents an unknown file.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Records.FileStatsRecord
member.summary: A record type representing statistics about the file hosting system. Demonstrates C# 9+ Record types for immutable data transfer objects.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Records.FileStatsRecord.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int64,System.DateTime)
member.summary: A record type representing statistics about the file hosting system. Demonstrates C# 9+ Record types for immutable data transfer objects.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileCategorizer
member.summary: Provides utility methods to categorize files into specific types based on their extensions.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileCategorizer.Categorize(System.String)
member.summary: Categorizes a file located at the specified path into a concrete implementation of .
member.param: The full or relative path to the file to be categorized.
member.returns: A concrete file model (MediaFile, ArchiveFile, or DocumentFile) based on the file extension.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService
member.summary: Core service for managing files in the hosting system.

member.name: E:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.FileAdded
member.summary: Occurs when a new file is successfully added to the storage provider.

member.name: E:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.FileDeleted
member.summary: Occurs when a file is deleted from the storage provider. The event argument contains the unique identifier of the deleted file.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.#cctor
member.summary: REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojamas statinis konstruktorius (1 t.)

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.#ctor(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.ILogger,LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IStorageProvider)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: The logging service used for tracking system operations.
The storage provider implementation used for file persistence.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.AddFiles(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity[])
member.summary: REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojamas raktažodis 'params' (0.5 t.)

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.UploadDocumentAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Demonstrates asynchronous programming.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.TryGetFile(System.Guid,LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity@)
member.summary: Attempts to retrieve a file by its unique identifier. This method demonstrates the use of the 'out' parameter modifier, which allows a method to return multiple values (a boolean indicating success, and the actual file entity if found). REIKALAVIMAS: Realizuota inicializacija naudojant 'out' argumentus (1 t.)
member.param: The unique identifier of the file to retrieve.
When this method returns, contains the file entity associated with the specified ID, if the ID is found; otherwise, null. This parameter is passed uninitialized.
member.returns: true if the file hosting service contains a file with the specified ID; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.DeleteFile(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a file from the system by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique of the file to be removed.
member.returns: True if the file was found and deleted; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.FilterFiles(System.Func{LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Filters files based on a provided condition using a delegate. This demonstrates the power of functional programming in C# using LINQ and lambda expressions. By passing a Func delegate, the caller can define custom filtering logic without modifying this class. REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojami delegatai arba lambda funkcijos (1.5 t.)
member.param: A function to test each file entity for a condition.
member.returns: An IEnumerable containing files that satisfy the condition.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.ProcessFiles
member.summary: Processes all files and performs actions based on their type and properties. This method heavily utilizes modern C# pattern matching features.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.GetRecentFiles(System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets a specified number of the most recently added files. Demonstrates the use of the C# 8.0 Range operator (..). REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojate 'Range' tipą (0.5 t.)
member.param: The number of recent files to retrieve.
member.returns: An array of recent file entities.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.GetFileNameOrDefault(System.Guid)
member.summary: Demonstrates the use of various null-checking operators in C#.
member.param: The file ID.
member.returns: The file name or a default string.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.GetFirstFileOrNull
member.summary: Demonstrates the null-conditional index operator.
member.returns: The first file entity, or null if the collection is empty.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.HasPermission(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity,LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions)
member.summary: Checks if a file has a specific permission using bitwise operations. REIKALAVIMAS: Naudojamos bitinės operacijos (1 t.)
member.param: The file entity.
The permission to check.
member.returns: True if the file has the permission, false otherwise.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.GrantPermission(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity,LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions)
member.summary: Grants a specific permission to a file using bitwise operations.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.RevokePermission(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity,LocalNode.Core.Enums.FilePermissions)
member.summary: Revokes a specific permission from a file using bitwise operations.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Services.FileHostingService.GetStats
member.summary: Returns system statistics using a Record type.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Storage.FileCache`1
member.summary: A generic caching mechanism for file entities. Demonstrates the use of Generics and custom collections.
member.typeparam: The type of file entity to cache.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.FileCache`1.#ctor(System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a specific expiration duration.
member.param: The amount of time an item remains valid in the cache.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.FileCache`1.Add(`0)
member.summary: Adds an item to the cache or updates an existing one with a new expiration timestamp.
member.param: The item to add to the cache.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.FileCache`1.Get(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves an item from the cache if it exists and has not expired.
member.param: The unique identifier of the cached item.
member.returns: The cached item if found and valid; otherwise, null.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.FileCache`1.ClearExpired
member.summary: Manually removes all expired items from the cache to free up memory.

member.name: T:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider
member.summary: Implements storage provider for local disk. Simulates capacity constraints.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.ProviderName
member.summary: Gets the display name of the storage provider.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.TotalCapacity
member.summary: Gets the total storage capacity of the local disk partition in bytes.

member.name: P:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.FreeSpace
member.summary: Gets the currently available free space in bytes.
member.remarks: This value is calculated dynamically by subtracting the sum of all stored file sizes from the total capacity defined for this provider.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.#ctor(System.Int64)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with a fixed capacity.
member.param: The maximum storage capacity in bytes.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.SaveFile(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Saves a file to the local storage if there is sufficient free space.
member.param: The file entity to be saved.
member.returns: True if the file was saved successfully.
member.exception: Thrown when the file size exceeds the available free space.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.SaveFileAsync(LocalNode.Core.Interfaces.IFileEntity)
member.summary: Asynchronously saves a file to the local storage.
member.param: The file entity to be saved.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation, containing true if successful.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.DeleteFile(System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a file from the local storage by its unique identifier.
member.param: The unique ID of the file to delete.
member.returns: True if the file was found and removed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:LocalNode.Core.Storage.LocalStorageProvider.GetAllFiles
member.summary: Retrieves a list of all files currently stored in this provider.
